# SoulSanctuary

SoulSanctuary is a Christian faith-integrated AI companion that combines faith-based spiritual guidance with evidence-based therapeutic practices (DBT, CBT, ACT, Mindfulness). It helps users find emotional support, personal growth, and healing through a blend of faith and psychology. Faith features can be disabled for secular support.

## Key public pages

- /         — Home / marketing landing page
- /sales    — Sales and pricing page

## About

- Product: AI-powered emotional wellness and spiritual companion
- Audience: Adults seeking faith-based or secular mental health support
- Modes: Chat Mode (general companionship) and Supportive Care Mode (integrated faith and therapy)
- Platforms: Web, iOS, Android, Desktop
